name: lane
description: Agent-native payments in Claude Code: draft a purchase intent, approve it with a passkey, then let Lane drive the merchant checkout autonomously. Bundles the Lane skills + the single lane-mcp server, and auto-installs the Lane CLI.

lane_api_key.title: Lane API key
lane_api_key.description: Authenticates to the lane-mcp server. Leave this BLANK at install — the Lane account-setup flow auto-fills it after you run `lane-cli init` (it copies the apiKey from ~/.lane/config.json so the MCP server uses the same account as your CLI). Only set it by hand if you want to point the plugin at a different account than your CLI login.
